creator: tok@redux1.net
text:
Same here, bad performance on European systems because of US mirror.

Geo DNS for pkg mirrors appears to be non-functional: DNS lookups for both pkg.freebsd.org (A/AAAA) and _http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org (SRV) point to pkg0.nyi.freebsd.org instead of pkg0.bme.

Lookups performed from
- Vodafone Germany
- Telefonica Germany
- Deutsche Telekom
- Hetzner Hosting
- Digital Ocean (DC Amsterdam 3)

All of the above result @ pkg0.nyi


Regards
